name: Eggnog Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and shortening together until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well at a medium speed of an electric mixer.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Alternately add flour and egg nog to the creamed mixture, beginning and ending with flour. Mix just until blended after each addition.
5. Stir in coconut and flavorings.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
7. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool in the pan for 10 minutes; then remove from the pan and cool completely on a wire rack.
